introSection: Teletren is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Parque Diversiones in La Uruca, San José, Costa Rica.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train looks like a steam train.

fullText:
Teletren is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Parque Diversiones in La Uruca, San José, Costa Rica.



The train looks like a steam train.
